positive: A highly stylized, minimalist vector illustration of an interstellar celestial body landscape. The scene features two dominant elements: a majestic, geometrically abstract mountain range composed of sharp, crystalline peaks, and a crescent nebula swirling with deep cyan, magenta, and gold dust. The composition is perfectly centered, creating a dynamic yet balanced silhouette. The style must evoke clean, sophisticated linocut print aesthetics combined with modern Bauhaus geometry, rendered in solid blocks of color and crisp lines. Excellent contrast is key, utilizing a deep midnight blue background and highlighting the structures with bright, vibrant pops of contrasting color (e.g., electric teal, coral pink). Suitable for apparel prints, with clean edges and no gradients. Cinematic, poster art quality.
